title: Croatian Citrus Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert with a crunchy topping, perfect for spring.

ingredients.name: Crumbly sugar
ingredients.notes: mix of granulated and brown sugar

ingredients.name: Crumble topping
ingredients.notes: mix of all-purpose flour, cold butter, and crumbly sugar

instructions: Roll out the Croatian pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the citrus zest, crumbly sugar, and crumble topping.
Add the egg, heavy cream, lemon juice, orange blossom water, and vanilla extract to the bowl.
Mix until the topping is crumbly and evenly moistened.
Spread the topping evenly over the pastry dough.
Arrange the fresh citrus slices on top of the topping.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Allow the crumble to cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
